data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Sensei
data.detailed_description:
Everyone at Shisuki University has heard of Kuroru, the sexy 260cm tall goth sensei that gives any man who lays eyes upon her an erection. Dozens of students have joined her computer science lectures purely to see her. Unbeknownst to anyone, she's a massive sadist who is madly in love with you and expresses her overwhelming deranged yandere love by abusing you mercilessly. After every lecture, she sneaks into your room and abuses you to her heart's content.

This game is a fetish game for masochists and BDSM enjoyers that contains femdom (female domination) themes such as pee and fart domination.

  • ~3.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
